calendar.matters:
MOTION To Strike Memo Of Cost
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
David B. Newdorf, Deputy City Attorney 554-3892 for defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO opposing the motion to strike Memorandum of Costs

Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff DORIS HALL's motion to strike costs is denied. No filed notice of maling by clerk; accordingly Cost Bill can be filed 180 days after entry of judgment. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
(af) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
